- [ JavaScriptCore ](/documentation/javascriptcore)

Initializer# init(range:in:)

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init!(
    range: NSRange,
    in context: JSContext!
)
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(range:in:)#return-value)

A newly allocated JavaScript object containing properties named location and length, with values from the NSRange.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(range:in:)#discussion)

Create a JSValue from a NSRange.
